title: coelogyne haslamii
intro: Coelogyne haslamii, also known as the Haslam's Coelogyne, is a species of orchid native to the Western Ghats in India. It is an epiphytic orchid that belongs to the Coelogyne genus, which is known for its fragrant, white to yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Coelogyne haslamii include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antioxidant, and it is often prepared into herbal teas or tinctures for consumption.
